description_long: This is a modern bullpup-style rifle with a compact, angular design and a matte black and gray finish. The main body is constructed from polymer and metal, featuring a prominent integrated handguard with a ribbed texture for grip. The rifle has a short, standard barrel protruding slightly from the front, and a fixed stock that is seamlessly integrated into the rear of the weapon. There is a visible trigger guard and a pistol grip, as well as a small green indicator light on the side, suggesting electronic or safety features. The top of the rifle appears to have a rail system for mounting optics, but only basic iron sights are present. The overall design is sleek and utilitarian, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A compact, bullpup-style rifle with a matte black and gray finish, ribbed handguard, and integrated fixed stock. Features a short barrel, iron sights, and a green indicator light.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the muzzle and the narrow profile of the barrel and handguard.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the full length of the rifle, the ribbed handguard, green indicator light, and the integrated stock.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the stock and the narrow width of the rifle, with the pistol grip and trigger guard visible.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the full profile, handguard, and the seamless integration of the stock.
